leadText: Sausages (Japanese: あらびきヴルスト Coarse Ground Sausages) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. These sausages should be boiled before eating.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh $ 400 $ 200 Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. These sausages should be boiled before eating. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh East Lake Axewell ( Camping King ) Rolling Fields , Hammerlocke Hills , Fields of Honor ( Ingredients Seller ) Possible gift after cooking curry Possible gift from other players in the Wild Area Poké Job reward (Tiers III-VI) Sw Sh IA Master Dojo refrigerator (after donating 100,000 W )
